SEARCH
Package com.boschrexroth.api

Interface Client

All Superinterfaces:
AutoCloseable
public interface Client extends AutoCloseable

Represents a client interface for interacting with a data layer, providing synchronous and asynchronous operations for various data manipulation tasks.

This interface extends AutoCloseable, indicating that resources held by implementations of this interface should be properly released when no longer needed, typically by calling the close() method.

Basis for all examples 

 try (com.boschrexroth.api.DlSystem s = com.boschrexroth.api.DlSystem.create("")) {
   ...
   try(Client c = s.Factory().createClient(" ... ")) {
   }
   ...
 }
 ...

    Retrieves the metadata for the specified address.

    Performs an asynchronous ping operation to check the connectivity and responsiveness of the data layer.
    Result
    pingSync()
    Performs a synchronous ping operation to check the connectivity and responsiveness of the data layer.

    Asynchronously reads a value from the specified address in the data layer.

    readSync(String address, Variant value)
    Synchronously reads a value from the specified address in the data layer.

    Asynchronously removes the data item at the specified address from the data layer.
    Result

    Synchronously removes the data item at the specified address from the data layer.

    setAuthToken(String token)
    Set persistent security access token for authentication as JWT payload

    Methods inherited from interface java.lang.AutoCloseable

    close

  • Method Details

    • setTimeout

      Result setTimeout(TimeoutSetting timeout, int value)
      Sets a timeout for subsequent operations.
      Parameters:
      timeout - The type of timeout to set (e.g., connection timeout, read timeout).
      value - The timeout value in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      A Result indicating the success or failure of the operation.

    • isConnected

      Boolean isConnected()
      Checks if the client is currently connected to the data layer.
      Returns:
      true if the client is connected, false otherwise.

    • pingSync

      Result pingSync()
      Performs a synchronous ping operation to check the connectivity and responsiveness of the data layer. 
      
   ...
   Result res = c.pingSync();
   ...
      Returns:
      A Result indicating the success or failure of the ping operation.

    • readSync

      Result readSync(String address, Variant value)
      Synchronously reads a value from the specified address in the data layer. 
      
   ...
   Variant v = Variant.create();
   Result res = c.readSync(" ... ", v);
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address of the data item to read.
      value - A Variant object to store the read value. This object will be populated upon successful read.
      Returns:
      A Result indicating the success or failure of the read operation.

    • writeSync

      Result writeSync(String address, Variant value)
      Synchronously writes a value to the specified address in the data layer. 
      
   ...
   Variant v = Variant.create();
   v.setInt32(-1);
   Result res = c.writeSync(" ... ", v);
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address of the data item to write to.
      value - A Variant object containing the value to write.
      Returns:
      A Result indicating the success or failure of the write operation.

    • browseSync

      Result browseSync(String address, Variant value)
      Synchronously browses for data items at the specified address in the data layer. This operation typically returns metadata or a list of sub-items. 
      
   ...
   Variant v = Variant.create();
   Result res = c.browseSync(" ... ", v);
   String [] vals = v.getArrayOfStrings();
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address from which to start browsing.
      value - A Variant object to store the browse results (e.g., a list of strings, a data structure).
      Returns:
      A Result indicating the success or failure of the browse operation.

    • metadataSync

      Result metadataSync(String address, Variant value)
      Synchronously retrieves metadata for the data item at the specified address. 
      
   ...
   Variant v = Variant.create();
   Result res = c.metadataSync(" ... ", v);
   byte [] vals = v.getFlatbuffers();
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address of the data item for which to retrieve metadata.
      value - A Variant object to store the retrieved metadata.
      Returns:
      A Result indicating the success or failure of the metadata retrieval operation.

    • createSync

      Result createSync(String address, Variant value)
      Synchronously creates a new data item at the specified address in the data layer. 
      
   ...
   Variant v = Variant.create();
   v.setInt32(-1);
   Result res = c.createSync(" ... ", v);
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address where the new data item should be created.
      value - A Variant object containing the initial value or structure for the new data item.
      Returns:
      A Result indicating the success or failure of the create operation.

    • removeSync

      Result removeSync(String address)
      Synchronously removes the data item at the specified address from the data layer. 
      
   ...
   Result res = c.removeSync(" ... ");
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address of the data item to remove.
      Returns:
      A Result indicating the success or failure of the remove operation.

    • Metadata

      comm.datalayer.MetadataT Metadata(String address)
      Retrieves the metadata for the specified address. 
      
   ...
   MetadataT res = c.Metadata(" ... ");
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address for which to retrieve metadata.
      Returns:
      A MetadataT object containing the metadata for the given address, or null if not found or an error occurred.

    • Browse

      String[] Browse(String address)
      Browses the data layer for child nodes or elements at the specified address. 
      
   ...
   String[] res = c.Browse(" ... ");
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address to browse from.
      Returns:
      An array of strings representing the names or addresses of the found child elements. Returns an empty array if no children are found or an error occurs.

    • getLastError

      Result getLastError()
      Retrieves the last error that occurred during a client operation.
      Returns:
      A Result object detailing the last error.

    • pingAsync

      Result pingAsync(ClientResponseCallback response)
      Performs an asynchronous ping operation to check the connectivity and responsiveness of the data layer. The result will be delivered via the provided callback. 
      
   ...
   CompletableFuture<Variant> futureResponseVariant = new CompletableFuture<>();
   CompletableFuture<Result> futureResponseResult = new CompletableFuture<>();
 
   ClientResponseCallback callback = (result, variant, userdata) -> {
            futureResponseVariant.complete(variant);
            futureResponseResult.complete(result);
   };
 
   Result res = c.pingAsync(callback);
 
   Variant receivedVariant = futureResponseVariant.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS); // Wait up to 5 seconds
   Result receivedResult = futureResponseResult.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
   ...
      Parameters:
      response - The ClientResponseCallback to receive the result of the ping operation.
      Returns:
      A Result object detailing the last error.

    • readAsync

      Result readAsync(String address, Variant args, ClientResponseCallback response)
      Asynchronously reads a value from the specified address in the data layer. The result and read value will be delivered via the provided callback. 
      
   ...
   CompletableFuture<Variant> futureResponseVariant = new CompletableFuture<>();
   CompletableFuture<Result> futureResponseResult = new CompletableFuture<>();
 
   ClientResponseCallback callback = (result, variant, userdata) -> {
            futureResponseVariant.complete(variant);
            futureResponseResult.complete(result);
   };
 
   Variant v = Variant.create();
   Result res = c.readAsync(" ... ", v, callback);
 
   Variant receivedVariant = futureResponseVariant.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS); // Wait up to 5 seconds
   Result receivedResult = futureResponseResult.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address of the data item to read.
      args - Optional arguments for the read operation (e.g., read options, filters).
      response - The ClientResponseCallback to receive the result and the read Variant.
      Returns:
      A Result object detailing the last error.

    • writeAsync

      Result writeAsync(String address, Variant args, ClientResponseCallback response)
      Asynchronously writes a value to the specified address in the data layer. The result of the write operation will be delivered via the provided callback. 
      
   ...
   CompletableFuture<Variant> futureResponseVariant = new CompletableFuture<>();
   CompletableFuture<Result> futureResponseResult = new CompletableFuture<>();
 
   ClientResponseCallback callback = (result, variant, userdata) -> {
            futureResponseVariant.complete(variant);
            futureResponseResult.complete(result);
   };
 
   Variant v = Variant.create();
   v.setInt32(-1);
   Result res = c.writeSync(" ... ", v, callback);
 
   Variant receivedVariant = futureResponseVariant.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS); // Wait up to 5 seconds
   Result receivedResult = futureResponseResult.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address of the data item to write to.
      args - A Variant object containing the value to write.
      response - The ClientResponseCallback to receive the result of the write operation.
      Returns:
      A Result object detailing the last error.

    • browseAsync

      Result browseAsync(String address, ClientResponseCallback response)
      Asynchronously browses for data items at the specified address in the data layer. The browse results will be delivered via the provided callback. 
      
   ...
   CompletableFuture<Variant> futureResponseVariant = new CompletableFuture<>();
   CompletableFuture<Result> futureResponseResult = new CompletableFuture<>();
 
   ClientResponseCallback callback = (result, variant, userdata) -> {
            futureResponseVariant.complete(variant);
            futureResponseResult.complete(result);
   };
 
   Result res = c.browseAsync(" ... ", callback);
 
   Variant receivedVariant = futureResponseVariant.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS); // Wait up to 5 seconds
   Result receivedResult = futureResponseResult.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address from which to start browsing.
      response - The ClientResponseCallback to receive the result and the browse results (e.g., a list of strings).
      Returns:
      A Result object detailing the last error.

    • metadataAsync

      Result metadataAsync(String address, ClientResponseCallback response)
      Asynchronously retrieves metadata for the data item at the specified address. The metadata will be delivered via the provided callback. 
      
   ...
   CompletableFuture<Variant> futureResponseVariant = new CompletableFuture<>();
   CompletableFuture<Result> futureResponseResult = new CompletableFuture<>();
 
   ClientResponseCallback callback = (result, variant, userdata) -> {
            futureResponseVariant.complete(variant);
            futureResponseResult.complete(result);
   };
 
   Result res = c.metadataAsync(" ... ", callback);
 
   Variant receivedVariant = futureResponseVariant.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS); // Wait up to 5 seconds
   Result receivedResult = futureResponseResult.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address of the data item for which to retrieve metadata.
      response - The ClientResponseCallback to receive the result and the retrieved metadata.
      Returns:
      A Result object detailing the last error.

    • createAsync

      Result createAsync(String address, Variant args, ClientResponseCallback response)
      Asynchronously creates a new data item at the specified address in the data layer. The result of the creation will be delivered via the provided callback. 
      
   ...
   CompletableFuture<Variant> futureResponseVariant = new CompletableFuture<>();
   CompletableFuture<Result> futureResponseResult = new CompletableFuture<>();
 
   ClientResponseCallback callback = (result, variant, userdata) -> {
            futureResponseVariant.complete(variant);
            futureResponseResult.complete(result);
   };
 
   Variant v = Variant.create();
   v.setInt32(-1);
   Result res = c.createAsync(" ... ", v, callback);
 
   Variant receivedVariant = futureResponseVariant.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS); // Wait up to 5 seconds
   Result receivedResult = futureResponseResult.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address where the new data item should be created.
      args - A Variant object containing the initial value or structure for the new data item.
      response - The ClientResponseCallback to receive the result of the create operation.
      Returns:
      A Result object detailing the last error.

    • removeAsync

      Result removeAsync(String address, ClientResponseCallback response)
      Asynchronously removes the data item at the specified address from the data layer. The result of the removal will be delivered via the provided callback. 
      
   ...
   CompletableFuture<Variant> futureResponseVariant = new CompletableFuture<>();
   CompletableFuture<Result> futureResponseResult = new CompletableFuture<>();
 
   ClientResponseCallback callback = (result, variant, userdata) -> {
            futureResponseVariant.complete(variant);
            futureResponseResult.complete(result);
   };
 
   Result res = c.removeAsync(" ... ", callback);
   
   Variant receivedVariant = futureResponseVariant.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS); // Wait up to 5 seconds
   Result receivedResult = futureResponseResult.get(5, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
   ...
      Parameters:
      address - The address of the data item to remove.
      response - The ClientResponseCallback to receive the result of the remove operation.
      Returns:
      A Result object detailing the last error.

    • createSubscription

      Subscription createSubscription(Variant ruleset, SubscriptionCallback callback)
      Setup a subscription
      Parameters:
      ruleset - A Variant that describe ruleset of subscription as subscription.fbs
      callback - A SubscriptionCallback to call when new data is available
      Returns:
      Subscription status of function call, return <null> see getLastError()

    • getConnectStatus

      Result getConnectStatus()
      Returns connect status of the client
      Returns:
      Result status of the client

    • getAuthToken

      String getAuthToken()
      Returns persistent security access token for authentication
      Returns:
      security access token for authentication

    • setAuthToken

      void setAuthToken(String token)
      Set persistent security access token for authentication as JWT payload
      Parameters:
      token - Security access token for authentication

    • readJsonSync

      Result readJsonSync(Converter cv, String address, Variant json, int indentStep)
      Reads a values as a JSON string
      Parameters:
      cv - Converter reference to the converter, see Factory
      address - address of the node to read
      json - Variant [in/out] Generated JSON as Variant (string)
      indentStep - is an indentation length for json string
      Returns:
      Result the status of function and generated JSON

    • writeJsonSync

      Result writeJsonSync(Converter cv, String address, String json, Variant error)
      This function writes a JSON value
      Parameters:
      cv - Converter reference to the converter, see Factory
      address - address of the node to write
      json - JSON value to write
      error - Variant Error of conversion as variant string
      Returns:
      Result the status of function

    • createBulk

      Bulk createBulk()
      Creates a ctrlX Data Layer bulk
      Returns:
      A Bulk instance
